# H8 Exchange - Crypto Trading Platform

## Project Setup Instructions

### Step 1: Project Initialization
- [x] Create Next.js 15 project with TypeScript
- [x] Setup directory structure
- [ ] Install all dependencies

### Step 2: Database Setup
- [ ] Configure PostgreSQL connection
- [ ] Create Prisma schema
- [ ] Run database migrations

### Step 3: Authentication
- [ ] Setup NextAuth configuration
- [ ] Create auth API routes
- [ ] Implement login/register pages

### Step 4: Backend Development
- [ ] Create API routes for orders
- [ ] Implement admin endpoints
- [ ] Create notification system
- [ ] Implement audit logs
- [ ] Setup exchange rate management

### Step 5: Frontend Development
- [ ] Create responsive layouts
- [ ] Build home page
- [ ] Build buy/sell pages
- [ ] Build admin dashboard
- [ ] Implement Arabic RTL support

### Step 6: Testing & Deployment
- [ ] Test all functionality
- [ ] Optimize performance
- [ ] Deploy to production

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Next.js API Routes
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: NextAuth
- **Storage**: Cloudinary
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI

## Key Features
- C2C USDT/EGP exchange
- Manual admin approval workflow
- Real-time notifications
- Comprehensive audit logging
- Exchange rate management
- Order tracking
- Admin dashboard
- Arabic RTL support
- Dark theme with gold accents
